topics: · Understanding pronunciation through a dictionary (Oxford Advanced Learner’s Dictionary)
· Transcribing one and two syllable words
· Story development from a given general topic

units.unit_title: Proper use of Punctuation and Capitalization
topics: · Use of Full Stop (.), Comma (,), Question Mark (?), Exclamation Mark (!)
· Use of Inverted Commas (" "), Apostrophe ('), Colon (:), Semicolon (;)
· Rules for using capital letters (Beginning of sentence, Proper nouns, etc.)
· Present Tense (Indefinite, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)
· Past Tense (Indefinite, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)
· Future Tense (Indefinite, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)
